name: 解决ubuntu下Matlab中找不到nvcc的问题
body:
参考自https://devtalk.nvidia.com/default/topic/695011/matlab-not-seeing-nvcc/

在matlab命令行中输入 

edit startup

It will open or create the file startup.m. Add the setenv line to the file, next time you restart Matlab the command
will be automatically executed.

在打开的startup.m文件中，输入 setenv('BASH_ENV','/etc/profile'); /etc/profile中，必须有export的nvcc的环境变量，例如 export PAHT=/usr/local/cuda-7.0/bin:$PATH  export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/cuda-7.0/lib64:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
